name: Ember Pebble GPT Edited Frames
description: Production-path avatar test: all visible animation frames generated by gpt-image-2 reference edits; local code only packages/QA checks.

locked.signatureFeature: warm glowing ember core inside belly
locked.silhouette: compact rounded pebble body with two fixed nub ears built into outline
locked.poseFraming: forward-facing centered desktop-overlay sprite with identical silhouette across states

stateActing.thinking: The pebble itself looks thoughtful through upward/side eye direction, an uncertain mouth, and a subtle internal ember-core swirl while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.focused: The pebble itself looks intent through narrowed eyes, a straight mouth, and a brighter sharper internal ember core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.happy: The pebble itself looks joyful through happy eyes, a bigger smile, and a warmer brighter internal ember core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.alert: The pebble itself looks startled through wide round eyes, a tiny open mouth, and a flaring internal ember core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
stateActing.sleepy: The pebble itself looks tired through half-closed droopy eyes, a sleepy mouth, and a dimmer internal ember core while the outer silhouette stays identical.
